title: GOVERNMENT COMPLAINTS AND OMBUDSMAN OFFICES - 211info
text: OFFICE OF OREGON GOVERNOR GOVERNMENT COMPLAINTS AND OMBUDSMAN OFFICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a list of Oregon ombudsman offices including Foster Care Ombudsman, Long-Term Care Ombudsman, Oregon Public Guardian and Conservator Program (OPG), Residential Facilities Ombudsman, Governor's Advocacy Office (ODHS), Office of Small Business Assistance, Small Business Ombudsman for Workers’ Compensation, Ombuds Office for Oregon Workers, Oregon Health Authority (OHA) Ombuds Program, and Office of Corrections Ombudsman. 775 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 378-4582 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-4582 Office Of The Governor INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for offices and contact information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Website: English, Spanish, Arabic, Chinese, Hindi, Hmong, Korean, Russian, Somali, and Vietnamese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - CONSTITUENT SERVICE OFFICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OFFICE OF OREGON GOVERNOR
